diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -25,6 +25,16 @@
 

         self.output_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+

+        # Causal self-attention over LSTM outputs

+        self.attn_q = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, bias=False)

+        self.attn_k = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, bias=False)

+        self.attn_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, bias=False)

+        self.attn_scale = hidden_dim ** -0.5

+        self.attn_out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.attn_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

+        self.attn_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+

         self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

 

     def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

@@ -35,5 +45,22 @@
         h, _ = self.lstm(x)

         h = self.output_norm(h)

         h = self.dropout(h)

+

+        # Causal self-attention

+        B, T, H = h.shape

+        q = self.attn_q(h)

+        k = self.attn_k(h)

+        v = self.attn_v(h)

+        scores = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(-2, -1)) * self.attn_scale  # [B, T, T]

+        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=h.device), diagonal=1).bool()

+        scores = scores.masked_fill(causal_mask.unsqueeze(0), float('-inf'))

+        attn_weights = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1)

+        attn_weights = self.attn_dropout(attn_weights)

+        context = torch.matmul(attn_weights, v)  # [B, T, H]

+        context = self.attn_out(context)

+        h = h + context

+        h = self.attn_norm(h)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

+

         logits = self.out(h[:, :-1])

         return torch.sigmoid(logits)
